_doc: Unified route store (ExileCampaigns). Source of truth; edited in-app and merged on import.

steps.text: Hand in Enemy at the Gate
Find and kill Hailrake, take Medicine Chest
Take portal (or WP to The Submerged Passage)
Find and kill The Dweller of the Deep
Hand in The Dweller of the Deep
The Warden's Quarters, kill Brutus, Lord Incarcerator
Place a portal at the Ship Graveyard Cave
Waypoint to The Cavern of Wrath
Find and kill The Great White Beast
Hand in The Great White Beast
Enter The Chamber of Sins Level 1
Enter The Chamber of Sins Level 2
Hand in Deal with the Bandits
Get Ribbon Spool from Blackguard Chest
Waypoint to The Solaris Temple Level 2
Hand in Sever the Right Hand
Hand in A Fixture of Fate
Enter The Upper Sceptre of God
Enter The Belly of the Beast Level 1

steps.areaName: The Belly of the Beast Level 1
steps.text: Enter The Belly of the Beast Level 2

steps.areaName: The Belly of the Beast Level 2
The Belly of the Beast Level 2
The Belly of the Beast Level 2
The Belly of the Beast Level 2

steps.text: Activate The Resonator, use Oriath Portal
Find and kill Justicar Casticus, take Eyes of Zeal
Hand in The Key to Freedom
Hand in In Service to Science
Waypoint to The Chamber of Innocence
Find and take Sign of Purity
Find 3xKitava's Torment, search in the corners of the map
Talk to Lilly Roth, Sail to Wraeclast
Hand in The Father of War
Light the Beacon, throw in The Black Flag
Sail to the Brine King's Reef
Enter The Chamber of Sins Level 1
Activate Map Device with Maligaro's Map
Hand in Essence of the Artist
Waypoint to The Chamber of Sins Level 1
Enter The Chamber of Sins Level 2
Hand in The Master of a Million Faces
Enter The Temple of Decay Level 1
Enter The Temple of Decay Level 2
Find and take Ankh of Eternity
Hand in Essence of the Hag
Waypoint to The Solaris Temple Level 1
The Sky Shrine, activate Statue of the Sisters
Kill Lunaris, Eternal Moon & Solaris, Eternal Sun
Find and take The Storm Blade
Hand in Queen of the Sands
Hand in The Ruler of Highgate
Enter The Belly of the Beast
Maligaro's Misery, kill Maligaro, The Broken
Hand in An End to Hunger
Talk to Lilly Roth, Set Sail from Oriath
